title: Worker/target mismatch: lulu is reachable on HASHI1 but no active lulu@HASHI9 route
resolution: Resolved by setting lulu workzone to /mnt/c/Users/thene/projects/HASHI, the WSL path for HASHI9 Windows repo C:\Users\thene\projects\HASHI. Lulu remains reachable via HASHI1 but will work in the Windows-side repo folder; HASHI9 Windows tests remain required before exit.

title: Akane plan review B1: HASHI9 WSL vs Windows-native topology unspecified
resolution: Resolved: v1 selects Topology A, Windows-native Remote + Windows-native HASHI core on HASHI9; WSL core topology documented future/advanced.

title: Akane plan review B2: logs endpoint v1 scope ambiguous
Akane plan review M1: logs tail parameter has no maximum
resolution: Resolved: plan sets default 120 and max 1000 with effective_tail/truncation metadata.

title: Akane plan review M2: start reason has no length/single-line sanitization bound
resolution: Resolved: plan sets 500 char persisted max, truncation, and CR/LF/control separator sanitization.

title: Akane plan review L1: acceptance criterion allowed already-present escape hatch
resolution: Resolved: existing code requires focused test coverage and smoke evidence.

title: Akane plan review L2: HASHI9 Windows smoke checklist unspecified
resolution: Resolved: plan now has seven minimum smoke checklist items.

title: Akane plan review L3: operator docs Windows/WSL handling depends on topology decision
resolution: Resolved: docs must describe Topology A as v1 and label Windows->WSL core as future/advanced unless separately implemented/tested.

title: Lulu implementation report omitted extra HASHI9 worktree changes: bin/bridge-u.bat and orchestrator/banner.py
resolution: Resolved: lulu confirmed bin/bridge-u.bat and orchestrator/banner.py are pre-existing/parallel dirty files, not Watchtower v1 intentional changes; scoped commit excludes them.

title: Akane final review L1: _fetch_workbench_health silently swallows probe exceptions
resolution: Future iteration: add DEBUG logging for failed workbench health probes. Nonblocking per Akane final review.

title: Akane final review L2: _append_rescue_audit silently returns when hashi_root is unset
resolution: Future iteration: add WARNING when rescue audit is skipped because hashi_root is unset. Nonblocking per Akane final review.

title: Akane final review L3: _hashi_control_status uses sync urlopen inside async start path
resolution: Future iteration: consider run_in_executor or async HTTP client if Remote rescue receives concurrent load. Nonblocking per Akane final review.

title: Akane final review L4: started=True audit path lacks direct field-completeness test
resolution: Future iteration: add a started=True audit record test. Nonblocking per Akane final review.

title: Orchestrator-side live Watchtower start verification missing before exit
resolution: Resolved: Zelda ran live Windows-native Remote smoke tests against isolated HASHI9 roots. L3 /control/hashi/start returned started=true with powershell.exe bridge_ctl.ps1 command and audit record; logs tail bounds and invalid name behavior passed; L2 start gate returned 403 and did not advertise rescue_start. Evidence recorded in LIVE_WATCHTOWER_SMOKE_EVIDENCE.md.

title: Akane addendum LOW: Windows CP1252 console cannot encode decorative Remote banner glyphs
resolution: Future iteration: make Remote banner/logging Windows console encoding-safe by detecting sys.stdout.encoding or replacing/skipping decorative glyphs under non-UTF-8 consoles. Nonblocking per Akane addendum review.
